title: README and AGENTS live staged operator verification runbook
problem: Live staged spine code and test hygiene are complete (tickets 167–197), but operators lack a single checklist for one-time manual OpenAlex verification of the orchestrator proof outside CI.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents one-time orchestrator live_network verification steps.
AGENTS.md references the runbook and env prerequisites.
Docs state temp DB only and not CI-enforced.
